description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a vibrant red and yellow color scheme, accented by playful graphics and cartoonish artwork on the side panels. The front panel includes a large display screen set above a control panel with a joystick and several buttons, as well as a visible coin slot and access door below. The marquee at the top is decorated with bold, colorful text and star motifs, enhancing its retro arcade appeal. The side panels are adorned with whimsical illustrations and a pattern of red and blue spheres, contributing to a lively and inviting appearance. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for the controls and coin mechanism. Its overall build is sturdy and designed to withstand frequent public use in urban entertainment settings.
description: A vibrant, retro-style upright arcade game cabinet with red and yellow colors, playful side graphics, and a classic control panel with joystick and buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, coin slot, and colorful marquee at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cartoon artwork, red and blue sphere pattern, and the cabinet's profile shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black panel with no visible artwork or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with matching artwork and color patterns.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat, medium-sized with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two main buttons, arranged in a simple, accessible configuration with a colorful background
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features a red background with white and yellow star motifs, bold text, and a playful, festive theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Cartoon-style artwork with a character, red and blue spheres, and a striped lower section, all set against a yellow background
